Bay Area Discounts

Stretch your budget and explore more of your community.

This guide highlights free and low-cost services, programs, and benefits within the core counties commonly recognized as the San Francisco Bay Area (Alameda, Contra Costa, Marin, Napa, San Francisco, San Mateo, Santa Clara, Solano, and Sonoma counties) for public benefit recipients, seniors, youth, college students, military/veterans, families, nonprofit organizations, and anyone looking to save on everyday expenses.

Some programs are available only in specific cities or regions, while others apply to all of California or nationwide. Always check the program or resource website for the most current eligibility details.

This is a community-maintained resource—if you notice outdated information or know of programs that should be included, please contribute via our GitHub repository.

How to Use This Guide

  • Browse a category below
  • Look for icons showing who the deal helps
  • Check Timeframe for seasonal or limited offers
  • Always confirm details before using or visiting

Eligibility Icons

Icon Meaning
💳 Requires benefit card or proof of income (e.g. SNAP/EBT, Medi-Cal/Medicaid)
📍 Proof of residency required (e.g. ID card/Driver’s license)
🧒 Youth
🎓 College Students
🎖️ Military / Veterans
👵 Seniors (65+)
🧑‍🦽 People with Disabilities
👨‍👩‍👧 Families & Caregivers
🌎 Everyone

Categories

  • Community
    • Childcare Assistance
    • Clothing Assistance
  • Digital Services
  • Education
  • Food
  • Health
  • Legal
    • Tax Preparation
  • Library Resources
  • Pet Resources
  • Recreation
    • Museums
  • Transportation
    • Public Transit
  • Utilities

Nonprofit Resources

College Student Resources

Community

2-1-1 Bay Area

Bay Area Community Services
🌎

Free 24/7 referral to food, housing, legal help, health care, and more

Ongoing Visit Program

Dolly Parton Imagination Library

California Community Services
🧒

Free book mailed monthly to child's home for kids (up to age 5); high-quality, age-appropriate books selected by experts; builds home library of up to 60 books by kindergarten

Ongoing (monthly until age 5) Enroll

Season of Sharing Fund

Bay Area Community Services
💳

Emergency rental and basic needs assistance to prevent homelessness

Ongoing Apply

VA Vet Centers

Nationwide Community Services
🎖️

Community & mental health support

Ongoing Find Location

YMCA

Nationwide Community Services
👨‍👩‍👧 🧒

Most locations offer sliding-scale membership rates

Ongoing Find Membership

Digital Services

Amazon Prime Access

Nationwide Digital Services
💳

Prime membership for $6.99/month for eligible government assistance recipients or income verified customers; new customers start with a free 30-day trial

Ongoing Learn More

Instacart for EBT/SNAP

Nationwide Digital Services
💳

50% off Instacart+ membership for one year; skip delivery/pickup fees with participating stores; new customers get $0 delivery on first 3 orders

Ongoing Apply

Kanopy for Students

Nationwide Digital Services
🎓

Free streaming for college students through participating campus libraries

Ongoing Find Your School

Walmart+ Assist

Nationwide Digital Services
💳

Eligible government assistance recipients receive Walmart+ at 50% off ($6.47/mo. or $49/yr.); new customers start with a free 30-day trial

Ongoing Apply

Education

ACT Fee Waivers

Nationwide Education
💳

Receive two free ACT tests (including optional science/writing); free access to official ACT Self-Paced Course (Kaplan); send scores to up to 20 colleges; can request college application fee waivers

Ongoing Apply

AP Exam Fee Reductions

Nationwide Education
💳

$37 College Board fee reduction per exam (schools forgo $9 rebate); final cost typically $53-62 per exam (down from $99); some CA districts provide additional funding bringing cost to $0

Ongoing Learn More

California College Promise Grant (CCPG)

California Education
💳

Waives enrollment fees ($46/unit) at all California Community Colleges for entire academic year

Ongoing Apply

Common App Fee Waiver

Nationwide Education
💳

Waived application fees at participating colleges through Common App

Ongoing Apply

SAT Fee Waivers

Nationwide Education
💳

Receive two free SAT tests; unlimited score reports; waived college app fees via participating colleges; free CSS Profile; waived regional, late, and cancellation fees

Ongoing Apply

T-Mobile Project 10Million

Nationwide Education
💳

Free mobile hotspot device with 200GB high-speed data per year for 5 years; optional $10/10GB data pass available when data limit is reached; free Web Guard content filtering

Ongoing Apply

Food

Alameda County Community Food Bank

Alameda County Food
💳 🌎

Free food pantries and distributions throughout county

Ongoing Find Location

Alameda Meals on Wheels

Alameda County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for homebound adults

Ongoing Apply

Bernal Heights Neighborhood Center - Brown Bag Program

San Francisco Food
👵 💳 🌎

Free supplemental groceries for SF residents 60+ (Thursday) and weekly food pantry for all residents

Ongoing Learn More

CalFresh Online

California Food
💳

Use EBT online at select stores

Ongoing Get Started

CalFresh Restaurant Meals Program (RMP)

Bay Area Food
💳 👵 🧑‍🦽 🌎

Use CalFresh EBT to buy prepared meals at participating restaurants (must be 60+, disabled, or homeless)

Ongoing Find Restaurants

Food Bank of Contra Costa & Solano

Contra Costa County Food
💳 🌎

Free groceries at mobile pantries and distribution sites

Ongoing Find Location

J-Sei Meals on Wheels

Alameda County Food
👵

Japanese-style meals for seniors 60+ who have difficulty leaving home

Ongoing Apply

Market Match

Bay Area Food
💳

Extra dollars for fruits & veggies at farmers markets

Ongoing Learn More

Meals on Wheels Contra Costa

Contra Costa County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for homebound seniors

Ongoing Apply

Meals on Wheels Diablo Region

Contra Costa County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for vulnerable seniors

Ongoing Apply

Meals on Wheels San Francisco

San Francisco Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for homebound seniors 60+ and adults with disabilities

Ongoing Apply

Meals on Wheels San Mateo County (Peninsula Volunteers)

San Mateo County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for adults 60+ who are primarily homebound; suggested donation $5.25/meal but never denied

Ongoing Apply

Project Open Hand

Bay Area Food
💳 👵 🧑‍🦽 🌎

Medically-tailored meals and groceries for people with critical illnesses; congregate meals for seniors; home delivery available

Ongoing Contact

Rainbow Grocery

San Francisco Food
💳 👵 🌎

10% discount for shoppers 60+ and EBT card holders

Ongoing Visit

Second Harvest of Silicon Valley

Santa Clara County Food
💳 🌎

Free food resources, groceries, and fresh produce

Ongoing Find Location

SF-Marin Food Bank

San Francisco Food
💳 👵 🌎

Free food pantries, home delivery for seniors/disabled, supplemental food program for seniors 60+

Ongoing Find Location

SOS Meals on Wheels

Alameda County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Daily home-delivered meals for homebound seniors 60+

Ongoing Apply

Sourcewise Meals on Wheels

Santa Clara County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Two daily meals meeting 2/3 of nutritional requirements; suggested contribution $3/day but never denied

Ongoing Apply

Spectrum Community Services Meals on Wheels

Contra Costa County Food
👵 🧑‍🦽

Home-delivered meals for seniors 60+ unable to prepare food

Ongoing Contact

St. Anthony's Dining Room

San Francisco Food
🌎

Free dine-in or to-go meals daily

Ongoing Visit

Universal School Meals

California Food
🧒 🌎

Free breakfast and lunch daily at all public schools (TK-12), regardless of income

Ongoing (school year) Learn More

WIC – Women, Infants & Children

California Food
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒

Free healthy foods, nutrition education, breastfeeding support for income eligible pregnant/postpartum women, infants, and children under 5

Ongoing Apply

YMCA Food Pantries

Bay Area Food
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free groceries and essentials at 17 locations serving 6,900+ people weekly

Ongoing Find Location

Health

988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline

Nationwide Health
🌎

Free 24/7 mental health crisis support via call, text, or chat

24/7 Call or Text 988

Crisis Text Line

Nationwide Health
🌎

Free 24/7 crisis support via text message

24/7 Text HOME to 741741

Denti-Cal

California Health
💳

Free/low-cost dental care for Medi-Cal recipients

Ongoing Learn More

EyeCare America

Nationwide Health
👵

Free eye exams and up to one year of care for seniors 65+ at risk for eye disease

Ongoing Apply

Medi-Cal (Medicaid)

California Health
💳

Free/low-cost health insurance to income-eligible residents

Ongoing Apply

NeedyMeds

Nationwide Health
🌎

Database of prescription assistance programs and discount cards

Ongoing Search

Planned Parenthood

Bay Area Health
💳 🌎

Sexual and reproductive healthcare on sliding scale: birth control, STI testing, cancer screenings, abortion services

Ongoing Find Location

Ryan White HIV/AIDS Program

California Health
💳

Free comprehensive care for people living with HIV/AIDS

Ongoing Find Provider

SAMHSA National Helpline

Nationwide Health
🌎

Free confidential 24/7 referrals and information for substance use treatment and mental health services

24/7 Call 1-800-662-4357

VA Health Benefits

Nationwide Health
🎖️

Comprehensive health support for veterans

Ongoing Apply

WIC (Women, Infants, Children)

California Health
💳 👨‍👩‍👧

Free nutrition assistance, health screenings, breastfeeding support for pregnant/postpartum women and children under 5

Legal

Court Fee Waivers

California Legal
💳 🌎

Filing fees waived

Ongoing Apply

San Francisco Immigrant Support

San Francisco Legal
💳 🌎

Free or low-cost immigration legal help (citizenship, green cards, DACA, etc.)

Ongoing Find Provider

SF Financial Justice Project

San Francisco Legal
💳 🌎

Helps reduce or eliminate certain city fines and fees (parking, towing, etc.) for eligible residents

Ongoing Learn More

USCIS I-912 Fee Waiver

Nationwide Legal
💳 🌎

Waiver of filing fees for certain immigration forms based on income/benefits

Case-by-case Learn More

AARP Foundation Tax-Aide

Nationwide Legal
👵 🌎

Free tax preparation with special attention to those 50+; no age requirement; help with all income levels; available at libraries, community centers, and senior centers

January-April Find Location

Alameda County Social Services Agency VITA

Alameda County Legal
💳 🌎

Free tax preparation; help with EITC and CalEITC credits

January-April Apply

Community Gatepath (formerly CCRC) VITA

Santa Clara County Legal
💳

Free tax preparation for low-income individuals and families

Seasonal Learn More

CSU East Bay VITA

Alameda County Legal
💳

Free virtual tax prep via Zoom for income $84,000 or less

February-April Schedule

IRS VITA Site Locator

Nationwide Legal
💳 🌎

Free tax preparation for individuals and families earning $67,000 or less; help with EITC, Child Tax Credit, and other credits; available in multiple languages

January-April Find Location

EBALDC VITA

Alameda County Legal
💳 🌎

Free tax preparation

Seasonal Learn More

Samaritan House VITA

San Mateo County Legal
💳 🌎

Free tax preparation with drop-off service

February-April Contact

SF State VITA

San Francisco Legal
💳 🎓 🌎

Free tax preparation by accounting students

February-April Learn More

SparkPoint Fremont VITA

Alameda County Legal
💳 🌎

Free current year and back tax preparation for low-to-moderate income families

Year-round Contact

United Way Bay Area

Bay Area Legal
💳

Free, secure, high-quality tax help for low- and middle-income residents across the Bay Area

January-April Find Location

🌎

Comprehensive directory of financial assistance programs, pet food banks, low-cost vet services, and emergency resources

💳 🌎

Low-cost spay/neuter and vaccinations

Dog Breed-Specific Assistance Programs

Nationwide Pet Resources
🌎

Financial assistance for veterinary care for specific breeds (Dobermans, Labradors)

📍 💳

Free pet food for Santa Clara County residents experiencing financial hardship; pick up every 30 days

🌎

Comprehensive directory of pet financial assistance programs and payment plans

📍 💳

Low-cost medical care for dogs and cats for eligible residents

Contra Costa County Pet Resources
📍 💳

Free pet food for residents who need assistance

Ongoing Contact

📍 🌎

Free pet vaccination clinics at locations across Contra Costa County

Joybound People & Pets - Pet Safety Net

Contra Costa County Pet Resources
📍 💳

Emergency resources to prevent pet surrender including food, vet care assistance, and supplies

Contra Costa County Pet Resources
📍 💳 🌎

Low-cost spay/neuter services

💳 👵

Muttville Senior Dog Rescue - Cuddle Club

👵

Free cuddle time events with senior dogs for adults 62+ (no adoption required)

Muttville Senior Dog Rescue - Seniors for Seniors

San Francisco Pet Resources
👵

💳 🌎

By appointment Schedule

Database of low-cost vet services, financial assistance, and pet resources by location

💳 🌎

Low-cost vet care, spay/neuter, vaccinations, microchipping, and more

💳

Free veterinary care and pet food assistance for people experiencing homelessness

💳 🌎

Affordable preventative care, including vaccines, parasite protection, and treatment for minor conditions

San Francisco Pet Resources
📍

Affordable spay/neuter services with tiered fees for eligible SF residents

SF Aid for Animals (SFAFA)

Bay Area Pet Resources
📍 💳

Financial support for urgent vet services for Bay Area residents with participating veterinary hospitals

Ongoing Apply

The Pet Fund

California Pet Resources
💳

Financial assistance for non-basic, non-emergency veterinary care (has waitlist)

Ongoing Apply

Vet Billing - Payment Plans

Nationwide Pet Resources
🌎

Directory of veterinarians offering payment plans or financing options

Ongoing Search

VETCO Clinics

Bay Area Pet Resources
🌎

Affordable vaccinations and basic pet health services at various locations

Weekly Find Location

VIP Petcare

Northern California Pet Resources
🌎

Walk-in weekend clinics offering vaccinations, microchipping, testing, flea/tick control (no exam fee)

Weekly Find Clinic

Recreation

California State Parks Adventure Pass

California Recreation
🧒

Free day-use passes for fourth graders attending a public school in California and their families to 54 participating state parks.

Ongoing Apply

Golden Bear Pass

California Recreation
💳

CalWORKs families can receive a free annual vehicle day-use pass to over 200 participating state parks and beaches operated by State Parks.

Ongoing Apply

Museums for All

Bay Area Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧

Free or low-cost admission for EBT cardholders with up to 4 guests at participating museums

Ongoing Find Museum

Aquarium of the Bay

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎖️ 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Locals, military, and other discounts, plus occasional benefit card offers

Ongoing Learn More

Asian Art Museum

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 👵 🎖️ 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free days, Museums for All admission, and discounts for students, seniors, and military

Ongoing Visit

Bay Area Discovery Museum

Marin County Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒 🌎

$5 admission for EBT/WIC cardholders; pay-what-you-can days

Ongoing Visit

California Academy of Sciences

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🌎

Museums for All admission ($3 per person); free neighborhood days for SF residents

Ongoing Visit

Chabot Space & Science Center

Alameda County Recreation
💳 🌎

$5 admission with EBT card; free telescope viewing nights

Ongoing Visit

Cartoon Art Museum

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 👵 🎖️ 🧒 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free or reduced admission for EBT/SNAP/Medi-Cal cardholders and discounted tickets for students, seniors, and military

Ongoing Visit

Children's Creativity Museum

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🧒 👨‍👩‍👧

Museums for All admission for families plus regular paid admission

Ongoing Visit

Children's Discovery Museum

Santa Clara County Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒

$1 admission with EBT card

Ongoing Visit

Children's Fairyland

Alameda County Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒

$5 admission with EBT or WIC card

Ongoing Visit

Exploratorium

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🌎

$3-$5 admission with EBT; free community days

Ongoing Visit

Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco (de Young Museum and Legion of Honor)

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 👵 🎖️ 🧑‍🦽 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free Saturdays for Bay Area residents, free first Tuesdays, youth free, Museums for All, military and other discounts

Ongoing Visit

Gardens of Golden Gate Park (Conservatory of Flowers, Japanese Tea Garden, SF Botanical Garden)

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎖️ 🌎

Free or reduced admission for SF residents, veterans, and Museums for All visitors; select free times for everyone

Ongoing Visit

Lawrence Hall of Science

Alameda County Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒 🌎

$1 admission with EBT card; free Cal Day

Ongoing Visit

Museum of the African Diaspora (MoAD)

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 🎖️ 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Museums for All admission, student and senior discounts, some free or community days, and free for active duty military

Ongoing Visit

Museum of Craft and Design

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 👵 🎖️ 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free first Thursdays, discounted tickets for students and seniors, free admission for some military, first responders, and benefit cardholders

Ongoing Visit

Oakland Museum of California

Alameda County Recreation
💳 🌎

$1 admission with EBT card; free first Sundays

Ongoing Visit

Oakland Zoo – Bay to Zoo

Alameda County Recreation
💳 👨‍👩‍👧 🧒

$5 admission for low-income families

Ongoing Visit

San Francisco Museum of Modern Art (SFMOMA)

💳 🎓 🎖️ 🧒 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free for youth, free days for the public, Museums for All admission for SF residents with benefits cards, military and veteran discounts, and Discover & Go passes

Ongoing Visit

San Jose Museum of Art

Santa Clara County Recreation
💳 🌎

Free admission with EBT card

Ongoing Visit

The Tech Interactive

Santa Clara County Recreation
💳 🌎

$5 admission with EBT card

Ongoing Visit

Walt Disney Family Museum

San Francisco Recreation
💳 🎓 🎖️ 👨‍👩‍👧 🌎

Free general admission for US military and dependents, Museums for All admission for SF EBT/CalFresh/Medi-Cal holders (cardholder plus guests), and student/senior discounts

Bay Area Transportation
💳

Discounted bike share membership for income-eligible riders

DMV Reduced-Fee ID Card

California Transportation
💳

Reduced-fee state ID for eligible residents using form DL 937

Lime Access

Bay Area Transportation
💳

Discounted or free Lime scooter rides (up to a set time per ride) for eligible riders

Low Cost Auto Insurance

💳

State-sponsored low-cost liability insurance for income-eligible drivers

🧒

🌎

35-50% discount on water and wastewater bills for income-eligible customers

Ongoing Apply

Internet Essentials by Xfinity

Nationwide Utilities
💳

Affordable home internet + Wi-Fi modem

Ongoing Apply

LIHEAP

California Utilities
💳

Help paying energy bills

Funding cycles Apply

Medical Baseline Allowance

California Utilities
🧑‍🦽

Extra low-cost energy allowance for customers with qualifying medical conditions requiring additional electricity or gas

Ongoing Apply

PG&E CARE & FERA

Northern California Utilities
💳

20-35% discount on electric and gas bills for income-eligible customers

Ongoing Apply

Recology 25% Low-Income Discount Program

San Francisco Utilities
💳

25% discount on garbage collection bills for qualifying customers

Ongoing Apply

SFPUC Customer Assistance Program (CAP)

San Francisco Utilities
💳

Increased 40% discount on water and sewer bills; protections from shutoffs/late fees for CAP participants

Ongoing Apply
